DESCRIPTION: When run_dir is empty or not yet created, appends markers to repo-root tables/runtime_execution_markers_fallback.txt (and may mkdir repo tables/). Violates strict separation if repo tables/ must remain analysis-only.

Upstream raw location is taken from a string inside Switching ver12/main/Switching_main.m (not validated to stay within repo); execution depends on off-repo absolute paths and folder naming conventions.

RUN_CONTEXT_IS_SWITCHING_ISOLATED compares run_dir against lowercase 'results\\switching\\runs' while createRunContext uses experiment 'Switching'; on case-sensitive filesystems the check may not reflect actual layout (logic/provenance risk, not an extra filesystem read).
